subcodes.first_line: O pure souls! Praise be to God that ye have been illumined by the celestial light and have been adorned with the blossoms and flowers of truth and inner meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانهای پاک الحمد لله بنور آسمانی روشن شدید و بشکوفه و ازهار حقائق و معانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
